segments.text: Mechanism, and it works very well as a red light, green light kind of a signal based on the quarterly figures.
And it also works very well at extremes.
If there is extreme bearishness, that is very bullish.
And from that level, when our market rallies, it is going to rally for three to five years.
We are currently not in that kind of a situation when I made this video for this guide.
